message:
feat(web): Add skeleton loading states and ErrorState component

- Add skeleton loading states for dashboard, workers, builds, metrics, and settings pages
- Create reusable Skeleton UI component based on shadcn/ui
- Create ErrorState component with retry functionality and collapsible error details
- Add errorHints for common RCH-specific errors (daemon connection, network, timeout)
- Integrate ErrorState with retry buttons across all pages
- Fix sidebar hydration lint warning by using useRef instead of useState

Closes: ngl.2, ngl.3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
